summary: Starlink works 5 mins after you receive it

TERAFAB: On the Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSMC) Q1 2026 earnings call, Chairman & CEO C.C. Wei said the following in regards to the Tesla/SpaceX Terafab Project.

"Well, actually, both Intel and Tesla, they are TSMC’s customer. Again, they are our competitors, and we… pic.twitter.com/t6VorfFhSh

— S.E. Robinson, Jr. (@SERobinsonJr) April 16, 2026

ai_summary: TSMC's Chairman disclosed during Q1 2026 earnings that Tesla and SpaceX are major TSMC customers while also competing in semiconductor manufacturing (via the Terafab project), prompting Elon to clarify that SpaceX/Tesla will remain primary TSMC customers rather than true competitors. This reveals a strategic partnership dynamic where Tesla/SpaceX are simultaneously building internal semiconductor capacity while maintaining dependence on TSMC for advanced chips—a key insight into vertical integration strategy and semiconductor supply chain management for hardware-intensive companies.

SpaceX/Tesla will be always be major customers of TSMC and not competitors in the normal sense of the word

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) April 18, 2026

This illustrates a critical scaling challenge in advanced manufacturing where existing suppliers cannot meet exponential demand growth from hypergrowth companies.

parent.text: Grok 4.3 (beta) has been released by @xai 🔥🔥 The new version of Grok is currently available to the highest tier plan SuperGrok Heavy. With 1T params Grok 4.3 is twice as big as Grok 4.20, and was also trained much longer. It should provide a decent jump in performance.
parent.name: Mark Kretschmann
parent.embed_html:
Grok 4.3 (beta) has been released by @xai 🔥🔥

The new version of Grok is currently available to the highest tier plan SuperGrok Heavy.

With 1T params Grok 4.3 is twice as big as Grok 4.20, and was also trained much longer. It should provide a decent jump in performance. pic.twitter.com/EygczR8eaX

— Mark Kretschmann (@mark_k) April 17, 2026

ai_summary: xAI released Grok 4.3 beta, currently a 0.5T parameter model available to SuperGrok Heavy tier users, with a 1T parameter model completing initial training in ~5 days expected to deliver major improvements in coding, long context, and overall capabilities. Elon highlights that xAI's 'model factory' infrastructure is now operational and producing improved base models, demonstrating progress in scaling AI training infrastructure—a critical business milestone for competing in large-language model development.
embed_html:
